info.name: FastMVC - Auto Generated
info.description: **One-click import:** this file includes **collection variables** (`base_url`, `reference_urn`, `reference_number`, `token`, `refresh_token`). Folders mirror the **URL path** (e.g. `health/live`, `items/{id}`). Import only this collection — no environment required. Edit values under the collection → **Variables** (or use the collection menu → Edit). Run **Collection Runner** for auto-generated tests per request. To also emit a separate environment JSON under `postman/`, set env var `POSTMAN_EXPORT_ENVIRONMENT=1` before boot.

item.name: Run sample request for an endpoint

Run sample request for an endpoint
